diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
         return gce_loss.mean()

 

 class FocalLoss(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, alpha=1, gamma=4, num_classes=100):  # Increased gamma to 4

+    def __init__(self, alpha=1, gamma=5, num_classes=100):  # Increased gamma to 5

         super(FocalLoss, self).__init__()

         self.alpha = alpha

         self.gamma = gamma

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@
     # Initialize model

     model = RobustCIFAR100N(num_classes=100).to(device)

     # Use Focal loss with increased gamma for more focus on hard examples

-    criterion = FocalLoss(alpha=0.25, gamma=4, num_classes=100)  # Increased gamma from 3 to 4

+    criterion = FocalLoss(alpha=0.25, gamma=5, num_classes=100)  # Increased gamma from 4 to 5

     optimizer = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.001, weight_decay=1e-4)

     scheduler = optim.lr_scheduler.StepLR(optimizer, step_size=10, gamma=0.1)
